title: Saudi Arabian Midnight Omelette
description: A traditional Saudi Arabian omelette filled with melted cheese and a hint of spice, perfect for a midnight craving.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together with a fork.
Add the whipping cream, salt, black pepper, cumin, and cayenne pepper to the bowl and mix well.
Heat the ghee or vegetable oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the breadcrumbs to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Pour the egg mixture over the breadcrumbs and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the edges start to set.
Add the grated cheese and chopped scallions to the pan and fold the omelette in half.
Cook for another 2-3 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the omelette is cooked through.
Slide the omelette out of the pan onto a plate and serve hot.
